name: employment-unfair-dismissal-without-process
userInput: I was dismissed from my marketing role last week with no warning, no investigation, and no chance to defend myself. My manager called me into a meeting on Monday, said performance had been below expectations, and that my employment was terminated with two weeks' notice. I had been there 4 years and had no prior warnings or performance reviews indicating problems. I'm a single parent and I'm worried about money. I want to challenge the dismissal.

caseData.issue: Summary dismissal for alleged poor performance with no warnings, no PIP, no investigation, no hearing, no opportunity to respond, no appeal offered.
caseData.evidence: 4 years' employment, contract, last three years of positive performance reviews, the termination email, calendar showing no prior performance management meetings, payslips, evidence of single-parent dependant status (relevant to mitigation and to compensation).
caseData.process: No grievance possible (already dismissed). The employer did not follow the ACAS Code: no written warning, no investigation meeting, no disciplinary hearing, no right of appeal. Dismissal was a single 10-minute meeting.
